S.FORM: == kakiliman == 2007 a mihcaan siwa a bulad tini sakaceku'kan nu kitakitdanay a kawaw tu nu satipanay bayuay a kuli, nilaculan == nisulitan ==
S.PHON: == kakir~ɾiman == **** a miħʦaan siwa a bur~ɾad tini sakaʦəkuʔ~ʡkan nu kitakitdanaj a kawaw tu nu satipanaj bajuaj a kur~ɾi, nir~ɾaʦur~ɾan == nisur~ɾitan ==
S.FORM: == kakiliman == 2007 a mihcaan siwa a bulad tini sakaceku'kan nu kitakitdanay a kawaw tu nu satipanay bayuay a kuli, nilaculan == nisulitan ==
S.PHON: == kakir~ɾiman == **** a miħʦaan siwa a bur~ɾad tini sakaʦəkuʔ~ʡkan nu kitakitdanaj a kawaw tu nu satipanaj bajuaj a kur~ɾi, nir~ɾaʦur~ɾan == nisur~ɾitan ==
